case_title: MCINTYRE, SHIRLEY vs. COFFEE RON'S, INC

docket_entries.description: CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF APPEAL/REQUEST FOR TRANSCRIPT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCINTYRE, SHIRLEY
NOTICE OF FILING APPEAL MAILED TO RESPONDENT; COPY DELIVERED TO APPELLATE DEPARTMENT
NOTICE OF DEFAULT ON APPEAL SENT TO APPELLANT
NOTICE TO APPELLATE DEPARTMENT OF DEFAULT ON APPEAL
NOTICE OF APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCINTYRE, SHIRLEY AS TO DEFENDANT COFFEE RON'S, INC STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED (LABOR APPEAL) COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-27-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 04

C/C FOR CORUT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. VISITING JUDGE JEROME T. STEVENSON, PRESIDING. CLAUDIA GALLAGHER, REPORTER. OPENING STATMENTS, BOTH SIDES. PLTF'S. AND DEFT'S. WITNESSES, SWORN AND EXAMINED. PLTF'S EXHIBITS, I.D AND EVID. PLTF AND DEFT'S REST. THE COURT AFTER CONSIDERING THE TESTIMONY AND REVIEWING THE EVIDENCE ORDERED PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING BY WAY OF HER COMPLAINT HEREIN. EVIDENCE OFFERED BY PLAINTIFF WAS INSUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THE ESSENTIAL FACTS NECESSARY TO JUSTIFY HER COMPLAINT.
PHOTOCOPY FOR THIRD PARTY STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF MCINTYRE, SHIRLEY THE ABOVE ACTION CAME REGULARLY FOR TRIAL ON 7/27/93 IN DEPARTMENT #4, JEROME T. STEVENSEN, VISITING JUDGE, PRESIDING. THE COURT HAVING HEARD AND CONSIDERED THE TESTIMONY AND ARGUMENT OF COUNSEL, THE MATTER HAVING BEEN SUBMITTED FOR DECISION, AND A STATEMENT OF DECISION NOT HAVING BEEN REQUESTED, TI IS ADJUDGED THAT JUDGMENT BE ENTERED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT COFFEE RON'S INC. AND THAT PLAINTIFF SHIRLEY MCINTYRE TAKE NOTHING BY WAY OF HER COMPLAINT.
